description: Monthly event count (SYNTHETIC in this file)
Number of days in calendar month
Count of days with Tmin >= 28C (official HKO hot night)
Monthly mean of daily mean temperature
Monthly mean of daily minimum temperature
Monthly mean of daily maximum temperature
Monthly mean absolute humidity (g/m3; Tetens from T and RH)
Days belonging to hot-night spells of length >= 3 (cross-month aware)
Days belonging to hot-night spells of length >= 5 (Wang 2019-inspired)
Days belonging to very-hot spells of length >= 5
Days inside a 5-day window with >=2 VHDs and >=3 hot nights
1 if any 2D3N-style window touches the month
Must equal SYNTHETIC for the development panel
